name: Sol Exuvia
desc2: Equip to increase Pyrois' combat capabilities. Can also be used to increase other Attack Agents' combat capabilities.
phaseDescs: CRIT Rate increases by 20%. When the equipper is Pyrois, using their <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</ct> grants the Eclipse effect. Under the Eclipse effect, DMG dealt by the equipper ignores <ct color=#2BAD00>16%</ct> of <ct color=#FE437E>Ether RES</ct>, lasting 45s. Repeated triggers reset the duration. When the equipper enters combat, they gain the Eclipse effect.

Under the Eclipse effect, DMG dealt by the equipper ignores <ct color=#2BAD00>17.5%</ct> of <ct color=#FE437E>Ether RES</ct>, lasting 45s. Repeated triggers reset the duration. When the equipper enters combat, they gain the Eclipse effect.
